items.title: Medici family mystery may be solved after 400 years with DNA analysis
items.description: Ancient DNA from Medici remains points to malaria, not murder, as the likely cause of death in a centuries-old Florentine mystery. [cnn.com]

items.description: Explore Cornell Lab of Ornithology’s interactive mural tracing 243 bird species across 375 million years of evolution. [academy.allaboutbirds.org]

items.title: “No AI” Statements Are More Than Mere Labels
items.description: A case for “No AI” statements as a deliberate stance on human-made work, transparency, and the value of the creative process—even when AI can mimic the final result. [journal.james-zhan.com]

items.description: Practical advice for building a happier life through everyday habits, perspective shifts, and simple changes in how you think and act. [hintjens.com]

items.title: Rain Robbers: How Four Farmers Faked a Drought and Stole Millions in Crop Insurance
items.description: Four Colorado ranchers allegedly tampered with rain gauges across Colorado and Kansas to trigger crop-insurance payouts, turning a drought scam into millions in fraudulent claims. [agweb.com]

items.title: Satan’s 19th-Century Bank Note
items.description: How Britain’s move from gold to paper money in the early 19th century fueled forgery, harsh prosecutions, and a debate over what money really is. [historytoday.com]
